query:
-- Look for services matching the BU numbers from the screenshot by address keywords
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.status,
  s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.dataSource,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.sipId
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE (s.dataSource LIKE '%Vocus SP%' OR s.supplierName LIKE '%Vocus%')
  AND s.serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Data', 'Broadband')
ORDER BY s.status, c.name
LIMIT 20;
